use_codes.desc: METHOD OF USING DESLORATADINE TO TREAT SEASONAL AND PERENNIAL ALLERGIC RHINITIS, PRURITIS, AND CHRONIC IDIOPATHIC URTICARIA IN PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
1.1 Seasonal Allergic Rhinitis
CLARINEX® is indicated for the relief of the nasal and non-nasal symptoms of seasonal allergic rhinitis in patients 2 years of
age and older.
